message:
feat(cli): archive-snapshot robot fallback, inbox resilience, and share update symlink hardening

Robot scope resolution:
- Add RobotDbHandle + ResolvedRobotScope abstractions to unify
  DB access across robot subcommands
- When local DB is missing a project/agent that exists in the
  archive storage tree, transparently reconstruct a snapshot DB
  and retry -- eliminates "project not found" for archived data
- Extract resolved_project_flag_or_env / resolved_agent_flag_or_env
  helpers for reuse in fallback eligibility checks

Inbox / RPC:
- Extract resolve_check_inbox_rpc_config_reader to decouple
  check-inbox RPC config from std::env::var, enabling unit tests
- Fall back to HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN when AGENT_MAIL_TOKEN is unset
- Accept {messages:[...]} and {result:[...]} server response
  shapes in server_inbox_payload_to_cli_json
- Detect isError:true in MCP tool results and classify as
  Rejected so the CLI falls through to local DB gracefully
- Accept structuredContent (camelCase) in coerce_tool_result_json
- Log server error when inbox falls back to local DB with no rows
- Reject limit=0 in check_inbox_direct with InvalidArgument

Share update symlink hardening:
- Replace inner copy_file/copy_dir_recursive/replace_dir/
  remove_file_if_exists/remove_dir_if_exists with symlink-safe
  share_update_* variants that check symlink_metadata at every
  path component
- Add tests for symlinked bundle root, signature, destination,
  and child-in-tree rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
